solver.method: penalty-RBE QP (CRA, Kao 2022), friction pyramid K=8, mu 0.84, density 2400 kg/m^3
solver.backend: native OSQP + sparse managed ADMM; out-of-process frahan_cra_worker above ~300 blocks

certificates.case: guell_barrel (architecturally trimmed, columns separated off, whole boundary supported)

certificates.note: a separate smaller funicular sanity capture (figures/whole_shell_cra_barrel.jpg); the 452-block Guell barrel above is the authoritative portico certificate.

infeasible_full_portico_WITH_7_leaning_c.note: every full-portico-WITH-columns attempt is SolverError/OOM at every thickness (0.28/0.40/0.50), mesh density (c3/c5) and trim (blunt/plan/arch/curve). The columns, not the shell, are the infeasibility source. Design lever = lean-to-thrust / multi-block piers / steel cores (Vault Steel Ties).

open_scale_item.blocker: LS-dual step is a dense meq^2 Cholesky (fine to ~3k rows); the 3159-stone assembly needs a SPARSE dual before it certifies at full skin resolution
open_scale_item.note: the compiled 3159-mould geometry (guell_rubble_COMPILED_v001.gh) is the FORM; the STRUCTURE is certified on the coarse thrust-quad barrel (452 blocks) + the three-prong.
